---
title: Overview
---

This site documents the **DuckDB Extensions Analysis** project.

Key links:

- Live reports (GitHub Pages): https://mjboothaus.github.io/duckdb-extensions-analysis/
- Source repository: https://github.com/Mjboothaus/duckdb-extensions-analysis

## What this repo does
- Analyses DuckDB core + community extensions.
- Generates Markdown/CSV/Excel outputs under `reports/`.
- Publishes a HTML view of the latest report via GitHub Pages.

## Where the docs live
- Great Docs site: `/docs/` (this site)
- Project docs in-repo: `docs/`
